_subagent_example._comment: Optional: constrain the `task` tool. allowedModels prevents typos triggering Ollama loads on fleets with pinned-per-server models. maxConcurrent overrides the default cap of 4. Both fields optional.

_remote_example._comment: Optional: bridge to a remote agent (e.g., Llama Rider) to discover and use its tools. Set `remote` to an object like below — `allow` curates which remote tools register to keep the system-prompt tool catalog small.
